description: Send notifications to your own ClickSend destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise clicksend:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a ClickSend SMS API JSON body and post it to api.clicksend.com (no Apprise).
name: msg-to-clicksend_sms

request.template: {"urls":"clicksend://${ customer_secrets.CLICKSEND_SMS_USER }:${ customer_secrets.CLICKSEND_SMS_APIKEY }@${ customer_secrets.CLICKSEND_SMS_TARGETS }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"clicksend://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.user_secret }} }:${ customer_secrets.{{ params.apikey_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"messages":[{"source":"php","to":"${ customer_secrets.CLICKSEND_SMS_TO }","body":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "") .. ((_body.title and _body.title ~= "" and _body.body and _body.body ~= "") and ": " or "") .. (_body.body or "")) *}}]}

{"messages":[{"source":"php","to":"${ customer_secrets.CLICKSEND_SMS_TO }","body":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "") .. ((_body.title and _body.title ~= "" and _body.body and _body.body ~= "") and ": " or "") .. (_body.body or "")) *}}]}
